name: kessler-vscode
description: Intelligently find and safely clean build artifacts and caches
author: Hariharen

kessler.showDeepArtifacts.description: Show 'deep' tier artifacts (e.g. builds, dist, bin) in the QuickPick menu. They will be unchecked by default for safety.

kessler.customDangerZone.description: Additional file or directory names to NEVER delete (e.g. ['my-secret-key.pem', 'docker-compose.yml']).

kessler.excludeFolders.description: Folders to completely skip during the workspace scan for performance.

kessler.scanGitIgnored.description: Scan and surface .gitignore'd directories. When enabled, the QuickPick menu switches to a 'Tiered' view (Safe, Deep, Ignored) instead of grouping by Project.

kessler.debrisColor.description: Choose the color of the status bar text when debris is found. (Click the status bar or run 'Rescan Workspace' to apply changes)

kessler.sizeThresholdGB.description: Total debris size (in GB) that triggers a warning notification. Set to 0 to disable.

kessler.autoCleanOnBranchSwitch.description: Automatically vaporize build artifacts (e.g., target, .next, build) when a Git branch switch is detected.

kessler.branchSwitchCleanupTargets.description: Directories to safely clean on branch switch (if autoCleanOnBranchSwitch is enabled).
